headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights UnitedHealth, Donaldson, Lowe's and ePlus
summary: Recent dividend hikes from UNH, DCI, LOW, PLUS and TD are drawing attention as investors seek stability amid inflation and geopolitical uncertainty.
